title: asclepias connivens
intro: Asclepias connivens, also known as the sneezeweed or green antelopehorn milkweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Asclepias connivens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Asclepias connivens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
